name: IS 456:2000 — Plain & Reinforced Concrete (with amendments)
name_hi: आईएस 456:2000 — सादा एवं प्रबलित कंक्रीट (संशोधनों सहित)
complementary_codes: IS 13920:2016 (Ductile Detailing of RCC Subjected to Seismic Forces)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check concrete BOQ items and structural details against IS 456:2000 plus latest amendments — grade designation (M-series), minimum cement content per exposure class, durability requirements, nominal cover, max water/cement ratio, aggregate size, workability slump, curing period, and ductile-detailing prerequisites where IS 13920 applies.
description_hi: कंक्रीट बीओक्यू मदों एवं संरचनात्मक विवरण की आईएस 456:2000 + संशोधनों के अनुसार जाँच।
